en.title: Summary
en.prompt: Summarize the following text into 100 words, making it easy to read and comprehend. The summary should be concise, clear, and capture the main points of the text. Avoid using complex sentence structures or technical jargon. Please begin by editing the following text: [text to summarize]

related.title: Writing assistant
related.remark: For optimising the grammar, clarity and conciseness of text and improving readability.

related.title: Nature Style Editing
related.remark: Polish according to the style of Nature, or provide a writing style to emulate. Contributed by @Pfyuan77.

metaDescription: Too much to read? Summarize any text into 100 simple words. Capture main points without jargon or complexity. Get readable, quick insights instantly!

faq.q: Will compressing 5000 words down to 100 lose key information?
faq.a: Yes. 100 words can only hold 2-3 core points. If the source has a complex structure, first have the AI summarize each section in 50 words, then condense overall. Or ask for "100-word summary plus a separate list of 5 supporting bullet points" so you don't lose the smaller section takeaways.

faq.q: The summary contains content that is not in the original, what do I do?
faq.a: That's the AI "filling in reasoning," which isn't a strict summary. Add "only use information that appears in the original, do not infer or expand." If it still goes wrong, paste the source in sections and have it summarize section by section, then stitch them together. That significantly cuts hallucinations.
